description_long: This house features a sprawling, multi-sectioned layout with a prominent central gable and two symmetrical side wings. The roof is steeply pitched and clad in dark shingles, with multiple intersecting gables and dormers adding architectural interest. The front facade includes a covered porch with a light brown roof supported by columns, and large windows are symmetrically arranged on each wing. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, contrasting with the dark roof and trim. The rear and side elevations reveal additional gables and a complex roofline, suggesting a spacious interior with multiple rooms and possibly open-plan living areas. The overall design is reminiscent of modern Craftsman or contemporary suburban homes, emphasizing both curb appeal and functional living space.
description: A large, multi-gabled house with a dark shingled roof, light exterior walls, and a covered front porch supported by columns. Symmetrical wings and prominent windows give it a modern Craftsman appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, central gable, and symmetrical side wings with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the complex, intersecting rooflines and the depth of the house's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying additional gables and the back elevation, with fewer visible windows and a simpler facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the extended roof sections and the arrangement of rooms within the wings.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, overhanging gable roof, and a prominent main door flanked by large windows.
